functionDeclarations.name: create_inventory_adjustment
functionDeclarations.description: Create an inventory adjustment (increase, decrease, or set) for a product at a warehouse. (POST /api/inventory-adjustments)

warehouse_id.description: The warehouse whose on-hand quantity is adjusted.

quantity.description: The magnitude of the adjustment (for increase/decrease) or the target on-hand value (for set). Must be non-zero and < 1,000,000.

unit_cost.description: Unit cost of the added stock. Required for an "increase" when the product has no existing average cost; ignored for decreases.

notes.description: Free-text reason for the adjustment (recommended for audit).
